_strategy: R11: 4/6 ns=null when bursting same-app candidates within 6s. Increased --submit-sleep to 8s to give backend allocator headroom. R12: K=8, mix of confirmed winners + new probes. (1) currency 2x, image-provider 2x, product-catalog 1x, fraud-detection×image-provider PAIR, frontend solo control, accounting solo. (2) Use longer inter-submit sleep.
_results: 7/8 ns=null with 8s submit-sleep. **ROOT CAUSE FOUND**: backend regression dup-suppression — `warnings.batches_exist_in_database` returns items=[] for repeat-submit-fingerprint. Need duration tweak or unique chaos params to bypass. Only a08 frontend (different fingerprint than recent submits) got real ns. Per memory `cloud_vke_validation`, this is documented behavior. R12 conclusion: R11/R12 currency/image-provider repeats with identical params are silently deduped.
